import uuid
import logging

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


def handle_request(request):
    correlation_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    logger.info(f"[{correlation_id}] Processing request")

    user = fetch_user(request.user_id, correlation_id)
    correlation_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    logger.info(f"[{correlation_id}] User fetched")

    orders = fetch_orders(user.id, correlation_id)
    correlation_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    logger.info(f"[{correlation_id}] Orders fetched")

    return build_response(user, orders, correlation_id)


def process_batch(items):
    for item in items:
        cid = str(uuid.uuid4())
        logger.info(f"[{cid}] Processing item {item.id}")

        result = transform(item, cid)
        cid = str(uuid.uuid4())
        logger.info(f"[{cid}] Transformed item {item.id}")

        save(result, cid)
